codeReview.summary: Commit 887c629 fixes both prior blocking findings (Language enum typing for translation locale, and empty-image guard in ImageTextBlock) and replaces the previous service-level response double-cast with an explicit Prisma-payload mapping function.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The nextjs-worker procedure requires reading `.factory/library/`, but this fix session transcript skeleton does not show any `.factory/library/*` reads while handoff marks `followedProcedure: true`.

summary: Pass. The fix adequately addresses the original failures from both prior reviews and no new blocking issues were introduced in the reviewed diff.
